# Shared-Contract Checklist (Archived)

This checklist is retained only as historical context from a prior dual-branch workflow.

Current `main` operations no longer require `menu-only` parity validation or `control-py` branch coupling.

Use active process guidance in:

- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- `.github/BRANCH-OPERATIONS.md`
